content.en:
Soon.

The Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River's Origin Realm have also withdrawn, and they will no longer fight with the Shadow Ruins.

Although Shadow Ruins was angry, they didn't want to continue to suffer heavy losses, so they naturally withdrew.

In this wave, both sides lost a lot of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

However, the Shadow Ruins suffered even more losses, and they didn't have the Blood Cave Demon Fruit.

All these years, they had been preparing to cultivate the Blood Cave Demon Fruit.

As a result, the Blood Cave Demon Fruit was destroyed, which naturally made them extremely angry.

And the most angry is the Lord of Qi He, this Blood Cave Demon Fruit was originally for him to eat, if he is lucky, he will break through to the Origin Upper Realm!

But now, there is no hope of a breakthrough.

This made him naturally angry, and he wanted to kill the Dragon River and kill the Lord of the Hidden Universe, but unfortunately he didn't have the strength.

......

"I didn't expect the Dragon River to really destroy the Blood Cave Demon Fruit of the Shadow Ruins!"

After Ye Tian learned the news, he was naturally very happy.

However, he was not ready to continue to trouble the Shadow Ruins, not because he didn't want to, but because he was afraid that he would be seen as flawed.

When the time comes, the eyes of the Shadow Ruins will focus on the east, which will not be a good thing!

"When the strength is strong in the future, erase the shadow ruins!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He left the ruins of the shadows without a sound and returned to the land of eternity.

Seventy-two domains in the east.

The Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor who did not have a shadow ruin attacked the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and gradually regained calm, and the major forces also lifted the blockade and returned to normal life.

And from beginning to end, they didn't know that Ye Tian had killed many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins.

Time flies.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian's strength has not improved much, but the strength of the Terran Sacred Pavilion has increased a lot, and many Heavenly Ancestors of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm have been born, but there are still no new births of the other side level geniuses.

After all, without his full cultivation, other Terran geniuses would not be able to become other Terran-level geniuses.

this day.

Ye Tian built an Eternal Ruins Divine Array in the Terran Holy Pavilion, and the movement was too loud, directly attracting the attention of other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Guheng Mountain.

The Lord of Gu Heng looked in the direction of the Terran Holy Pavilion, his eyes full of envy.

"This should be some kind of top-notch Origin Array, definitely far beyond the Tailing Origin Array!!"

The Lord of Gu Heng could feel the horror of this magic circle, its power was too powerful.

If he was able to enter such a magic circle to comprehend and cultivate, he would definitely be able to greatly increase his origin rules, and the speed of his cultivation would be very fast.

Unfortunately, he doesn't have that qualification.

Not only Ye Tian, but also many other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were secretly snooping, but no one dared to invade such a magic array, that was looking for death.

Terran Sanctuary.

After Ye Tian built the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, he let his son Ye Xingchen enter it to comprehend.

In such a magic circle, Ye Xingchen could definitely easily comprehend the origin rules of the other side, and even raise the origin rules of the other side to a certain level.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen entered the Eternal Ruins Divine Array and went to comprehend and cultivate.

More than a hundred years later, Ye Xingchen came out of the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, exuding the aura of the Origin Rules of the other side.

Obviously, Ye Xingchen succeeded.

Next, Ye Tian was ready to cultivate Ye Xingchen to master the complete Golden Body of the Other Side, and if it was successful, let Ye Xingchen impact the Heavenly Ancestor Realm of the Origin Realm.

Thereupon.

One of his replica bodies has been assisting Ye Xingchen in cultivating the complete golden body of the other side, pulling it back from the brink of fall again and again, and preparing various treasures to restore his body.

However, even so, if Ye Xingchen wants to cultivate a complete golden body on the other side, it will take unimaginable years.

......

100,000 primeval years have passed.

Ye Tian's other side of the origin rule has made slow progress, and it has only been raised to the realm of eighty out of four, and this is still the effect of his use of the Eternal Ruins God Array.

Although the Eternal Ruins Divine Array could not help him break the big bottleneck, and after reaching the Eighty Percent Realm, the effect was also very weak, but he had built the Eternal Ruins Divine Array many times, and the effect was still somewhat effective after relying on long years of penance.

But.

If he wanted to comprehend the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the realm of eighty percent and nine, it would take a long time, measured in millions of primeval eras.

"If you can get something like the Abyss Fruit on the other side, then you can quickly improve the origin rules of the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's a pity that there are too few such opportunities, and even if there is, it may not necessarily be his turn.

In order to be able to obtain such an opportunity, Ye Tian still wandered around in the Innocent Abyss, sacrificing his life again and again, just to be able to find an opportunity that would help him.

this day.

Ye Tian came to an area of the Innocent Abyss, which was covered with countless plants, each of which was extremely tough, and its defense was definitely no less than that of an ordinary Origin Descending Realm Peak Heavenly Ancestor.

And such plants are everywhere.

There seems to be no information about this place from the outside world, and Ye Tian doesn't know what this place is.

But he sensed that there should be something good here, so he went deeper.

It didn't take long.

He saw an incomparably terrifying vine with countless blood-colored eyes on it.

Originally, the eyes of this vine were closed, but when Ye Tian approached, the pupils of this vine opened.

The next moment.

His body was instantly pierced by a vine of this vine, and he was killed instantly.

Beyond the Innocent Abyss.

Ye Tian's duplicate body trembled, revealing a look of shock.

"What a terrifying vine, its strength is definitely stronger than many Origin Upper Realms!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

By replicating the body, he was able to find the name of the vine.

【Unsullied Demon Vine】

What shocked him even more was that he sensed a talent full of question marks from the other party's body, which meant that his copy talent level was not as high as the other party's talent level, and he couldn't detect or copy the other party's talent.

"Beyond the primeval level of talent!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

He knew that his copying talent had to be upgraded again before he could hope to copy the talent on the other party.

"Does Wind Tooth Island know about the existence of the Innocent Demon Vine?"

Ye Tian was curious.

So, he came to consult the Lord of Qingyun.

Qingyun Island, a palace.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Qingyun sat together, drinking tea and chatting.

At first, the two were just chatting, but soon after, Ye Tian mentioned the Innocent Demon Vine.

"Lord of Qingyun, do you know about the Innocent Demon Vine?"

As soon as he heard the Innocent Demon Vine, the face of the Lord of Qingyun changed drastically.

"Lord of Endless, you shouldn't have provoked the Innocent Demon Vine, right?" but soon, the Lord of Qingyun reacted, "No, if you really provoke the Innocent Demon Vine, you won't be able to chat with me here." "
